props.message:
MIRELAKE.

The Source slows here, settling between the reeds. Black streams trickle in from the Burnt Hollow to the west, staining the water like old ink.
Step lightly, traveler. The peat will swallow what it can. The wisps know the path — if they don't mean you harm, follow them.
Half-sunken cairns of Source-stone, raised by older hands than ours. Lirien's name is carved on the lowest course — the rest is mud.
The shrine drowns, year by year. Whatever the keepers warded sleeps under the water now. The wisps gather thickest here.

props.open_message: An offering of the keepers, preserved in pitch and reed. A curved Source-blade that returns to the hand that throws it.
A handful of smooth river-pebbles, weighed for the sling.
A pulse of the Source, gathered into a small warm thing. It steadies your breathing.
